fixes_applied.fix: Corrected enforce.required_checks.coverage_minimum → enforce.thresholds.minimum_coverage_percent in enforcementCheck() (runner.js:116-117). This was a silent bug making coverage enforcement always pass.
Added ESM main guard (process.argv[1] === __filename check) and named exports to runner.js. Enables unit testing without module-level side effects.

recommendations: 1. Add integration test that verifies runner.js launches successfully with valid appfinisher/ directory structure (subprocess test). 2. Consider adding timeout handling in runClaude() — execSync with no timeout can hang indefinitely. 3. Consider structured JSON logging in addition to chalk console output for CI/CD compatibility.
